title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 178.470 - Report to the general assembly
text:
178.470.  Report to the general assembly. — The state treasurer as custodian of funds for vocational education and the director of revenue shall include in the annual report to the general assembly required by section 32.060 a report of the receipts and disbursements of moneys received under the provisions of the acts of congress.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 13-47) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 § 162.070)
